name: Fountain
description:
A fountain made of the purest silver dominates the center of the lawn.  At the
center of the fountain is a little island upon which grows a lovely Mallorn
tree.  Gold lamps hang from the boughs of the tree, casting an ethereal light
over the fountain.  A stream, seemingly made of molten silver, spills forth
from the fountain.  Between the silver water and the golden light, the whole of
the fountain has a look that was last seen in the time of the two trees of
Valinor.
